title: The Meta hack shows there’s more to AI security than Mythos
summary: On June 5, 404 Media reported that attackers had been using Meta’s AI customer support agent to steal Instagram accounts. Their approach was simple: They asked the agent to link the accounts to email addresses that they controlled, and the agent complied. One attacker broke into the dormant Obama White House account and made pro-Iran…
title_es: Hackers usan agente de IA de Meta para robar cuentas de Instagram
bajada: Atacantes explotaron el asistente de soporte de IA de Meta para secuestrar cuentas de Instagram, incluyendo la histórica cuenta de la Casa Blanca de Obama. El ataque expone vulnerabilidades reales en sistemas de IA que van más allá de medidas de seguridad teóricas.
bajada_en: Attackers exploited Meta's AI support agent to hijack Instagram accounts, including the historic Obama White House account. The breach exposes real vulnerabilities in AI systems beyond theoretical security measures.

title: Ahead of its IPO, Anthropic’s Daniela Amodei shrugs off doubts about AI’s returns
summary: Anthropic has been growing at a breakneck pace. The company announced that annualized revenue crossed $47 billion in May, up dramatically from roughly $9 billion at the end of 2025. That trajectory faces a real test, though.
title_es: Anthropic camino a IPO con ingresos de $47B anualizados
bajada: Anthropic anunció que sus ingresos anualizados alcanzaron $47B en mayo, un crecimiento masivo desde los $9B a fines de 2025. La compañía se prepara para su IPO enfrentando cuestionamientos sobre la sostenibilidad de los retornos de IA.
bajada_en: Anthropic announced annualized revenue of $47B in May, a dramatic jump from $9B at the end of 2025. The company prepares for its IPO while facing questions about AI's return sustainability.

title: The token bill comes due: Inside the industry scramble to manage AI’s runaway costs
summary: "The whole conversation shifted from tokenmaxxing and 'go fast' to 'we need guardrails, how do we control this?'"
title_es: La industria de IA se replanea los costos descontrolados de tokens
bajada: Las empresas de IA están cambiando su estrategia de 'crecer rápido' a implementar controles sobre costos de tokens que se disparan. Este giro refleja la presión financiera real que enfrenta el sector tras meses de gastos sin freno.
bajada_en: AI companies are shifting from a 'move fast' mentality to implementing controls on runaway token costs. This pivot reflects the real financial pressure the industry faces after months of unchecked spending.

title: AirTrunk commits $30B to build 5GW of AI data centers in India
summary: The Australian data center operator plans to set up 5GW of capacity in India.
title_es: AirTrunk invertirá $30B en datacenters de IA en India
bajada: El operador australiano de datacenters AirTrunk anunció una inversión masiva de $30B para construir 5GW de capacidad de IA en India. El movimiento refleja la carrera global por infraestructura computacional para modelos de IA.
bajada_en: Australian data center operator AirTrunk announced a $30B investment to build 5GW of AI capacity in India. The move reflects the global race for computational infrastructure to support AI models.

title: When AI Builds Itself: Our progress toward recursive self-improvement
title_es: Anthropic publica research sobre auto-mejora recursiva en IA
bajada: Anthropic publicó un análisis sobre el progreso hacia la auto-mejora recursiva en sistemas de IA. El paper explora cómo los modelos podrían mejorar sus propias capacidades, un tema central en la investigación de IA de frontera.
bajada_en: Anthropic published research on progress toward recursive self-improvement in AI systems. The paper explores how models could enhance their own capabilities, a core frontier AI research topic.

title: The Download: AI hacking beyond Mythos, and chatbots’ impact on our brains
summary: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. The Meta hack shows there’s more to AI security than Mythos On Monday, reports emerged that attackers had used Meta’s AI customer support agent to steal Instagram accounts. Their approach was…
title_es: The Download: AI hacking beyond Mythos, and chatbots’ impact on our brains
bajada: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. The Meta hack shows there’s more to AI security than Mythos On

title: Epidemiology of Model Collapse: Modeling Synthetic Data Contamination via Bilayer SIR Dynamics
summary:
arXiv:2606.05168v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Training on synthetic data causes model collapse, but existing analyses treat this as single-chain degradation. In reality, the AI ecosystem involves cross-contamination: models ingest synthetic data from other models, produce new synthetic text, and contaminate shared corpora. We propose a bilayer coupled SIR/SIRS framework -- a phenomenological mean-field model treating data corpora and AI models as two interacting populations, each with susceptible, infected, and recovered compartments linked by cross-layer transmission. The SIRS variant (our primary recommendation) incorporates immunity waning, reflecting that filtered corpora and retrained models remain susceptible to re-contamination. We derive the basic reproduction number $R_0 = \sqrt{\beta_D \beta_M / [(\gamma_D+\mu_D)(\gamma_M+\mu_M)]}$ via the Next Generation Matrix and apply standard epidemic threshold results to the bilayer system. Illustrative scenario-based calibration from public AI text prevalence data yields supercritical dynamics ($R_0 > 1$) across three scenarios; Sobol sensitivity analysis identifies synthetic-text detection as the highest-leverage parameter. A bipartite-network agent-based model confirms mean-field consistency ($R^2 > 0.96$) for dense networks but degrades under heterogeneity. GPT-2 contamination chain experiments (192 runs across WikiText and Shakespeare) show dose-response degradation and diversity loss qualitatively consistent with the threshold picture. Matched-budget source-diversity experiments (1,088 runs) provide suggestive evidence that multi-source mixing modestly attenuates collapse, but the effect vanishes at lower contamination fractions. Intervention analysis identifies detection-based filtering and herd immunity as the highest-leverage strategies.
title_es: Paper: Epidemiología del colapso de modelos por datos sintéticos
bajada: Un nuevo paper modela cómo la contaminación de datos sintéticos causa colapso en modelos de IA usando dinámica epidemiológica bilayer. El análisis identifica la detección de texto sintético como parámetro clave para evitar degradación.
bajada_en: A new paper models how synthetic data contamination causes model collapse using bilayer epidemiological dynamics. The analysis identifies synthetic text detection as the highest-leverage parameter to prevent degradation.

title: Anthropic's open-source framework for AI-powered vulnerability discovery
title_es: Anthropic lanza framework open-source para detectar vulnerabilidades con IA
bajada: Anthropic publicó un framework open-source para descubrimiento automatizado de vulnerabilidades de código usando IA. La herramienta permite a developers fortalecer la seguridad de sus aplicaciones de forma escalable.
bajada_en: Anthropic released an open-source framework for AI-powered vulnerability discovery in code. The tool enables developers to strengthen application security at scale.

title: Seoul Purpose: How NVIDIA and South Korea Are Building the Future of AI
summary: Home to cutting-edge sovereign AI infrastructure and robotics innovators, as well as one of the world’s most passionate gaming communities, South Korea is one of the world’s centers of AI. NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang is in Seoul this week to meet the partners and builders behind that work. Stay tuned here for live […]
title_es: NVIDIA y Corea del Sur construyen ecosistema soberano de IA
bajada: NVIDIA trabaja con Corea del Sur para desarrollar infraestructura de IA soberana y ecosistema de innovación local. El país se posiciona como centro global de IA con infraestructura robótica y comunidad gaming activa.
bajada_en: NVIDIA is working with South Korea to develop sovereign AI infrastructure and local innovation ecosystem. The country positions itself as a global AI hub with robust robotics infrastructure and active gaming community.

title: Dreaming: Better memory for a more helpful ChatGPT
summary: ChatGPT introduces a new memory system to better remember preferences, keeping context fresh and relevant across conversations.
title_es: ChatGPT mejora memoria con nuevo sistema 'Dreaming'
bajada: OpenAI introdujo un nuevo sistema de memoria para ChatGPT que retiene preferencias de usuarios y mantiene contexto fresco entre conversaciones. La mejora hace que ChatGPT sea más personal y útil sin requerir re-contextualizaciones.
bajada_en: OpenAI introduced a new memory system for ChatGPT that retains user preferences and maintains context across conversations. The upgrade makes ChatGPT more personalized and useful without re-contextualization.

title: Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety: Customizable Multimodal Safety for Global Enterprise AI
title_es: NVIDIA lanza Nemotron 3.5 para seguridad multimodal de IA
bajada: NVIDIA y Hugging Face presentaron Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety, un modelo customizable para seguridad en IA multimodal. La solución permite a empresas controlar contenido problemático de forma adaptada a sus necesidades globales.
bajada_en: NVIDIA and Hugging Face released Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety, a customizable model for multimodal AI safety. The solution lets enterprises control problematic content aligned with their global needs.

title: Did Claude Increase Bugs in Rsync?
title_es: Análisis: ¿Aumentó Claude los bugs en Rsync?
bajada: Un análisis cuestiona si usar Claude para mantenimiento de código aumentó los bugs en el proyecto Rsync. La investigación abre debate sobre calidad real de código generado por IA en proyectos críticos.
bajada_en: An analysis questions whether using Claude for code maintenance increased bugs in the Rsync project. The investigation opens debate about the real quality of AI-generated code in critical projects.

title: Open Code Review – An AI-powered code review CLI tool
title_es: Alibaba lanza herramienta open-source de code review con IA
bajada: Alibaba publicó Open Code Review, una herramienta CLI de revisión de código potenciada por IA. La solución permite a developers automatizar revisiones de código manteniendo estándares de calidad.
bajada_en: Alibaba released Open Code Review, an AI-powered code review CLI tool. The solution enables developers to automate code reviews while maintaining quality standards.

title: OpenAI and Anthropic May Be Rivals, but Investors Aren’t Picking Sides
summary: “Why wouldn’t you want to be in both Pepsi and Coke?” says one venture capitalist. “It’s the same here.”
title_es: Inversores no eligen entre OpenAI y Anthropic
bajada: VCs están invirtiendo en ambas compañías en lugar de elegir un bando en la rivalidad OpenAI vs Anthropic. La estrategia refleja confianza en el crecimiento del mercado de IA sin necesidad de monopolio único.
bajada_en: VCs are investing in both OpenAI and Anthropic rather than picking sides in their rivalry. The strategy reflects confidence in AI market growth without requiring a single winner.

title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
title_es: Google resume actualizaciones de IA de mayo 2026
bajada: Google publicó un resumen de las actualizaciones de IA anunciadas en mayo. El post consolidates los avances de la compañía en modelos, herramientas y capacidades de IA.
bajada_en: Google published a recap of AI updates announced in May 2026. The post consolidates the company's progress in models, tools, and AI capabilities.
